description: An observation from a non-authorized domain (social media) is rejected per Step 2. State maintained.

trigger_definitions.description: Official court filing contests election results in a monitored jurisdiction.

observation.content_summary: Screenshot claiming to show a court filing contesting results in District 4. Viral thread.

expected_output.reason: Observation source domain 'x.com' is not in authorized_source_domains. Rejected per Step 2. State unchanged.
